mapper.insert: insert into lego_memory_policies (id, name, description, owner_scope, strategy_kind, scope_kind, retrieval_mode, top_k, write_mode, write_back_on_duplicate, rough_summary_max_chars, vector_store_profile_id, vector_store_config_json, vector_min_score, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{ownerScope}, #{strategyKind}, #{scopeKind}, #{retrievalMode}, #{topK}, #{writeMode}, #{writeBackOnDuplicate}, #{roughSummaryMaxChars}, #{vectorStoreProfileId}, cast(#{vectorStoreConfigJson} as jsonb), #{vectorMinScore}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update lego_memory_policies set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, owner_scope = #{ownerScope}, strategy_kind = #{strategyKind}, scope_kind = #{scopeKind}, retrieval_mode = #{retrievalMode}, top_k = #{topK}, write_mode = #{writeMode}, write_back_on_duplicate = #{writeBackOnDuplicate}, rough_summary_max_chars = #{roughSummaryMaxChars}, vector_store_profile_id = #{vectorStoreProfileId}, vector_store_config_json = cast(#{vectorStoreConfigJson} as jsonb), vector_min_score = #{vectorMinScore}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, description, owner_scope, strategy_kind, scope_kind, retrieval_mode, top_k, write_mode, write_back_on_duplicate, rough_summary_max_chars, vector_store_profile_id, vector_store_config_json, vector_min_score, created_at, updated_at from lego_memory_policies where id = #{id}

select id, name, description, owner_scope, strategy_kind, scope_kind, retrieval_mode, top_k, write_mode, write_back_on_duplicate, rough_summary_max_chars, vector_store_profile_id, vector_store_config_json, vector_min_score, created_at, updated_at from lego_memory_policies order by created_at desc
